text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O seems to be putting on a tough
front, trying to act how she did before the
discussion of potentially being past her peak
came up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every Umamusume at the Takarazuka Kinen is
popular in their own right. There's Inari One, a
racer from the local scene who's been gaining
momentum, and Bamboo Memory, who's been
improving by leaps and bounds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's even Yaeno Muteki, who Sakura Chiyono
O competed against in the Classics.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Faced with these rivals, Sakura Chiyono O tries to
reassure herself by whispering that she'll be okay.
